variants: Originally from Blueridge Junction, Nasim Ghalandar currently makes his home in Stonepetal Bluff. He is an alumnus of Zinc Lantern College, where he focused his studies on the Arabic language. Now, as an employee of Vortex Isle Studios, Nasim applies his linguistic expertise to a variety of projects in a professional setting. His background in Arabic enriches his contributions, allowing him to blend creativity with his scholarly pursuits. Nasim's journey illustrates a clear and steadfast dedication to both his roots and his craft.
